targeted_memory_tests.command: conda run -n zcj_hello python -m pytest tests/test_memory_hybrid_retrieval_stage6.py tests/test_memory_extractor.py tests/test_memory_service.py tests/test_memory_extraction_state.py tests/test_memory_stage1_correctness.py -q

stage5_dispatch_regression.command: conda run -n zcj_hello python -m pytest tests/test_stage5_dispatch_performance.py -q

postgres_integration.command: conda run -n zcj_hello python -m pytest tests/test_postgres_repositories.py tests/test_streams_outbox.py::test_ingest_memory_barrier_blocks_query_but_not_enrichment -q

cost_metrics.note: Real LLM and embedding baselines were not run in this implementation pass.

open_items: Build and run the 1000-case realistic quality dataset.
Run rules, llm, and hybrid comparisons with real model and embedding telemetry.
Implement Memory embedding backfill and refresh lifecycle.
Run 10K-memory p95 benchmark for cached and uncached hybrid retrieval.
